embeds.title: Paris Opera Ballet
embeds.description: The Paris Opera Ballet (French: Ballet de l'Opéra national de Paris) is a French ballet company that is an integral part of the Paris Opera. It is the oldest national ballet company, and many European and international ballet companies can trace their origins to it. It is still regarded as one of th

content: you know idol was not that highly regarded too and they still suffer the same issue
the peak of fashion

Sex trafficking was a bitter and cruel reality for ballet dancers in the 19th century. In France, to become a ballet dancer, girls had to start learning and training from a very young age. They had to undergo years of training before they could hope to become ballet dancers with important performances or sign long-term contracts. These innocent young girls fell into the sights of wealthy men (called abbonés). They saw them as sweet macarons, easily molded and destroyed. These men came to see ballets not to appreciate the art, but to see the beautiful ballet dancers. And after the performances, they would go backstage and engage in sexual trafficking of the dancers they targeted. Would the girls dare to refuse when these men have both money and the power to silence them?

reminds me of this anti-rape psa poster i saw
"don't rape people"
"carry a rape whistle, if you feel the urge to rape someone, blow it to alert others so they can stop you from raping"
Lol
humans are the 1 creature that can rise above their nature
so i dont believe in "human nature" when it comes to this kind of thing
literally just dont be evil
its that easy
Few Human then

im the least kind person in existence

which is crazy

you have to not see women as real people
Yes, these people definitely need medical attention for sure
nobody believes they are evil is the core thing about it
people believe they are kind and good even when commiting vile acts
or at the very least find mental gymnastic and loopholes to justify it
rapist typically do this by saying the victim likes it and even ushered them on
its incredibly vile
not hard to do with how rampent misogyny was and still is
sadly society isnt quite there yet although we managed to have some wins
its certaintly better than it was some years ago
tho in many ways it can feel like its degressing sometimes
in some places it becomes worse sadly <:Feelguilty:1400771618174664775>

anyway back to Liz and in that regard its really interesting
